name: abu-context-engineering
description: Codex-native context engineering workflows for research, domain wiki maintenance, quality profiling, specs, surface maps, design documents, screen batch audits, goal prompts, integration-reality plans, verification, handoffs, and AGENTS.md authoring.

interface.shortDescription: Research-first Codex workflows for building projects.
interface.longDescription: Abu Context Engineering adds reusable Codex skills for repo-local .thoughts context, reality research, project quality profiling, source-backed domain wiki maintenance, specs, stories, product surface maps, design documents, screen batch audits, goal prompts, research-backed plans with integration-reality matrices, verification audits, handoff compaction, and concise AGENTS.md authoring.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Abu Context Engineering to research my project, define the quality profile, and keep the repo-local .thoughts wiki updated.
